channel.title: enola.bedard TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from enola.bedard

item.title: UNAVEEEZ!!! 🐚☀️🌊🌴🎶 It’s almost time… dropping TONIGHT at 9PM PT / 12AM EST!! Music video drops TOMORROW at 9AM PT 🎬 Comment “UNAVEZ” if you’re ready 🫶🏻
item.description: UNAVEEEZ!!! 🐚☀️🌊🌴🎶 It’s almost time… dropping TONIGHT at 9PM PT / 12AM EST!! Music video drops TOMORROW at 9AM PT 🎬 Comment “UNAVEZ” if you’re ready 🫶🏻

item.title: My new song UNAVEZ is out now on all streaming platforms!!! Use my song for your next videos and I’ll repost all of them!! Can’t wait to see!!!

item.title: It’s only been a day that my new song “UNAVEZ” is out and thank you so so much for all the love!! Use my song in your next videos and tag me. Can’t wait to see

item.title: Dancing next to @JLO was a dream come true! What a great way to start the year. Who is gonna learn this dance??? #CantGetEnough @DYNAMIC LEGENDS @Baby lawd jiggy boss @kidmac10

item.title: When we did a FULL OUT concept video to Jet Ski in public 👀 wait for the reactions ahahha! Who wanna see the results????? Full video out TOMORROW cant wait🇧🇷🔥🙌🏻 #jetski #behindthescenes #brazil
